title: RESTful API doc missing headers for /libpod/build
body:
Hello,
I found that in the HTTP API documentation the header parameters for [/libpod/build](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html#tag/images/operation/ImageBuildLibpod) are missing (it is used to send the build context to the podman service). See for comparison the compat API for [/build](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html#tag/images-(compat)/operation/ImageBuild) where the header parameters are listed after all the query parameters, just before the responses. I think this is one of the issues reported in https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/6547:

> 'Libpod Build Image' has the same issue as the above one and no request samples

comments.body: I can take a look at this.
